description: MailMonitor is an email deliverability platform that audits sending health, identifies spam issues, and provides expert remediation to achieve 90-plus percent inbox placement rates.
tagline: Improve inbox placement and email deliverability
overview: MailMonitor helps companies running large email programs move messages out of spam and into inboxes by combining real-time analytics, sending-reputation audits, and expert remediation, with users typically reaching a 90-percent inbox placement rate within 90 days.
what_is: MailMonitor is an email deliverability platform built for businesses whose campaigns suffer from poor inbox placement. It takes a comprehensive approach: auditing the overall health of an email program, pinpointing the root causes of spam classification, and then applying targeted fixes to sending practices and domain reputation. The combination of diagnostics and hands-on remediation sets it apart from tools that only report problems.

Companies running high-volume campaigns with low engagement or frequent spam-folder routing are the primary users. The platform's real-time analytics give teams visibility into where messages land across major providers, while the expert remediation service shortens the path to improvement. Users typically see inbox placement reach 90 percent within 90 days of implementation.

Within a marketing technology stack, MailMonitor functions as a dedicated deliverability and reputation monitoring layer that sits alongside CRM and email marketing platforms. It is not a tool for designing emails, building automations, or managing campaign schedules; its focus is ensuring that whatever messages a team sends actually reach the intended inbox.
